series_metadata.series_description: This form is completed by ODOT users of ODOT owned equipment. The user is responsible for inspecting all applicable items on the equipment and verifying this on the EM-44 form.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain form for 90 days, may be kept longer if needed in a HazMat situation. HazMat situations must be retained until released by Chief Legal., Paper: Recycle
